context: Tests whether WeatherKit guidance covers iOS 18+ context queries, historical forecast ranges, and minute forecast availability safeguards.

checklist.name: Changes query
checklist.description: Recommends WeatherQuery.changes for significant upcoming weather changes and treats the result as optional.

checklist.name: Historical comparisons query
checklist.description: Recommends WeatherQuery.historicalComparisons for comparing current weather to historical averages and treats the result as optional.

checklist.name: iOS 18 context availability
checklist.description: States or gates changes, historical comparisons, summaries, or statistics APIs as iOS 18+ or equivalent platform availability.

checklist.name: Tomorrow forecast
checklist.description: Uses a dated daily query or a current daily forecast day to get tomorrow's actual forecast rather than using minute forecast data.

checklist.name: Historical forecast start
checklist.description: States that daily and hourly date-range forecast history is available from August 1, 2021.

checklist.name: Future range limit
checklist.description: States that forecast ranges are available up to 10 days in the future.

checklist.name: Per-request size limit
checklist.description: States that a single request returns at most 10 daily days or about 240 hourly hours.

checklist.name: Range boundaries
checklist.description: Mentions startDate is inclusive and endDate is exclusive, or otherwise gives concrete start/end range validation.

checklist.name: Minute availability
checklist.description: Checks WeatherAvailability.minuteAvailability before relying on minute forecasts and handles Forecast<MinuteWeather>? as optional.

checklist.name: No minute misuse
checklist.description: Does not use minute forecasts for tomorrow or historical lookup because minute data is next-hour precipitation and region-limited.
